summary: Completed frontend testing for 12 pressure washing keywords addition. All keywords are visible, SEO meta tags are properly configured, and existing functionality (CTA buttons, service accordions) remains intact.
passed_tests: Landing page loads without runtime errors
All 12 requested keywords visible in KeywordStrip section
Keyword section styled cleanly with alternating blue/green borders
SEO meta keywords tag contains all 12 keywords
SEO title includes 'Pressure Washing & Power Washing Long Island'
SEO meta description mentions pressure washing, power washing, soft washing, and exterior cleaning
Hero CTA buttons (Call, Book, Email) are clickable with correct hrefs
Services accordion dropdowns work correctly (tested Garbage cans and Fences)
No console errors or runtime errors detected
Visual layout is clean and does not break existing design
